meaning: n.(夏威夷人戴的)花环,花冠
examples: Lei Feng's spirit will live in our hearts.
Lei Feng's spirit will be remembered by the whole nation forever.
To our sadness, Lei Feng died in an accident in 1962.
Mr. Lei has told the journalist that the images in the video had been digitally manipulated.
In Beijing, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesman Hong Lei reiterated a call for calm on all sides.
